hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Engineer · AI & Automation · Web & Cloud
hero.tagline: I build products that perform — 45% faster, 35% leaner, and ready for 600+ users on day one.

about.label: 01 / About
about.bio: I'm a Full-Stack Engineer with 4+ years turning technical requirements into production-ready software. I've cut API costs 35%, boosted platform speed 45%, and shipped a streaming system serving 600 concurrent users — all in real production environments.
about.bio2: My stack spans React, Next.js, Node.js, Django, Flutter, and AWS. I integrate AI into products that actually work: automated reporting, LLM chatbots, document generation, and voice interfaces.
about.bio3: I don't just write code — I solve the business problem behind the ticket.

services.label: 03 / Services
services.s1desc: Production-grade apps built to scale — from architecture decisions to deployed product. I own the full lifecycle.
services.s2desc: I put AI to work: reducing manual effort, cutting costs, and adding intelligent features your competitors don't have yet.
services.s3desc: Web experiences that stop the scroll — 3D scenes, physics-based animations, and storytelling that converts.
services.s4desc: Cross-platform apps that feel native — published on App Store and Google Play with real users.
services.s5desc: Containerized, monitored, CI/CD-ready infrastructure that doesn't break at 2am.

experience.label: 05 / Experience
experience.e1desc: Built web and mobile apps with Django, PHP and Flutter for edtech and SMBs. Shipped a CMS that eliminated the need for developer involvement in day-to-day content updates.
experience.e1a1: CMS adoption: non-technical users self-manage content with zero dev intervention
experience.e1a2: Automated academic reporting — hours of manual work reduced to seconds
experience.e1a3: Led sprint delivery in SCRUM — 100% on-time sprint completion
experience.e1a4: Built AI engine for automatic performance matrix generation
experience.e2desc: Owned full-stack performance at a fast-growing platform. Cut API costs 35%, improved load times 45%, and built a streaming system that held up at 600 concurrent users in production.
experience.e2a1: –35% API call reduction via smart caching & backend refactor
experience.e2a2: +45% faster load times — measurable improvement in user retention
experience.e2a3: Live streaming system: 600 concurrent users, zero downtime
experience.e2a4: Voice-driven web experience shipped for aviation sector client
experience.e2a5: AR experience with Apple Vision SDK, SwiftUI and Objective-C
experience.e3desc: Improved mobile performance and automated internal processes that were previously done manually across multiple teams. Also shipped iOS apps to production.
experience.e3a1: –25% mobile resource consumption with targeted profiling & optimization
experience.e3a2: Automated processes that went from hours to minutes of execution time
experience.e3a3: Cloud deployments on AWS with Docker containerization
experience.e3a4: Shipped iOS applications via Apple Developer Program
experience.e4desc: Reduced query bottlenecks and built new feature modules for a React + Node.js platform. Resolved production incidents with fast root-cause analysis.
experience.e4a1: –30% load time improvement via SQL query refactoring
experience.e4a2: New modules with React + Node.js integrated with MySQL
experience.e4a3: REST API integration & production incident resolution
experience.e5desc: Reduced UI bugs by 60% in the first month. Automated reporting workflows and shipped apps on both mobile stores. Integrated Twilio for real-time communications.
experience.e5a1: –60% frontend visual error rate in first 30 days
experience.e5a2: Reporting automation with Node.js — eliminated manual data exports
experience.e5a3: Published on App Store & Google Play simultaneously
experience.e5a4: Twilio integration: real-time comms in production

contact.label: 07 / Contact
contact.description: Open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and technical collaborations. Typical response within 24h.
